description_long: This modern bungalow features a striking black-and-white exterior with clean, geometric lines and a flat, angular roof. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage, while the rear opens onto a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella-shaded table. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The property is landscaped with several trees and hedges, offering privacy and greenery. The structure appears to be single-story with a partial loft or raised section, and the materials suggest a combination of concrete, wood, glass, and metal. The overall design is contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a black-and-white facade, large windows, a wooden deck, and a swimming pool, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a clear view of the pool and deck area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the depth of the house, with trees and hedges lining the property.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the expansive wooden deck, swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back corner, showing both the pool area and the driveway, with visible landscaping and outdoor amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass doors and scattered windows
